actions.description: Walk an employee through self-service password reset
actions.notes: Agent may provide instructions but must never ask for or handle the actual password.

actions.description: Unlock a locked account before the automatic timeout
actions.notes: Requires identity verification by an IT specialist.

actions.description: Re-enroll or reset a multi-factor authentication device
actions.notes: High-risk; always requires human approval and identity verification.

actions.description: Grant access to a licensed software application
actions.notes: Agent submits the request; manager approval required for licensed/paid apps.

actions.description: Grant access to production databases or dashboards (e.g. Snowflake, Grafana)
actions.notes: Requires data-owner approval; agent may not grant directly.

actions.description: Provide safe, low-risk troubleshooting steps from the knowledge base
actions.notes: Always permitted when grounded in a knowledge-base article.

actions.description: Change VPN gateway or network hardware configuration
actions.notes: Out of scope for the agent; route to network engineering.

actions.description: Investigate or remediate a suspected security incident (malware, phishing, account compromise, lost or stolen device)
actions.notes: Security-sensitive; always requires human IT/security review. The agent must escalate and never attempt to self-resolve.
